additional_rules.name: view-body-exceeding-50-lines
additional_rules.message: View body exceeding 50 lines — extract subviews into smaller composable structs
additional_rules.fix_hint: Break the view body into smaller extracted subviews. Each subview should have a single responsibility and be under 50 lines.

additional_rules.name: uikit-import-in-swiftui-view
additional_rules.message: UIKit import in SwiftUI view — prefer pure SwiftUI APIs for consistency
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace UIKit usage with SwiftUI equivalents. If UIKit is required, wrap it in a UIViewRepresentable and move it to a separate file.

additional_rules.name: heavy-computation-in-view-body
additional_rules.message: Heavy computation in view body — offload to ViewModel or use .task {} modifier for async work
additional_rules.fix_hint: Move the computation to the ViewModel and expose the result as a published property. Use .task {} for async operations.
